# `pitchfork daemons`

- **Usage**: `pitchfork daemons [--json] <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Aliases**: `daemon`

List configured daemons from all merged config files.

## Flags

### `--json`

Output in JSON format

## Subcommands

- [`pitchfork daemons add [FLAGS] <ID> [ARGS]…`](/cli/daemons/add.md)
- [`pitchfork daemons remove [--local] [--project] <ID>`](/cli/daemons/remove.md)
